# Gaps Identified

Issues found during review iterations.

## Issue Pattern

When you add issues to this list, use the format:

- [ ] **ISSUE TITLE** - Issue Description that contains enough context for a loop to pick it up, get oriented in the code and then address the issue.

New issues are added to the `Open Issues` section. Resolved issues (where the [x] box is checked) are moved to the `Resolved Issues` section.
